description: Use this API to export rawx (extended raw data) table to a CSV (comma-separated values) file. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr = rawx_to_csv(tblname, ofile)

parameters.name: tblname
parameters.description: Name of the data table to export (not case sensitive). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ofile
parameters.description: File path of the csv output file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
